title: Anticoagulation documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting clinician-performed benefit-risk discussion, adherence and control review, renal and bleeding context, annual reassessment, and documented decisions without generating a medicine choice or dose.

source.title: Atrial fibrillation: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected, diagnosed, or previously treated atrial fibrillation or atrial flutter.
source.setting: Primary, outpatient, acute, and specialist cardiovascular care.
source.exclusions: Exact for clinician-led AF detection, risk and cardiac-function assessment, documented care review, and anticoagulation review. Treatment recommendations, named medicines, risk-score conclusions, and doses are not mapped, and UAE pathways require local adaptation.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.6.1-1.6.17 and 1.11.1-1.11.2 - anticoagulation discussion and review

assessment.text: Supports documenting clinician-performed benefit-risk discussion, adherence and control review, renal and bleeding context, annual reassessment, and documented decisions without generating a medicine choice or dose.
assessment.rationale: The NICE section supports clinician-documented anticoagulation benefit-risk discussion, adherence and control review, renal and bleeding context, patient preference, annual reassessment, and recorded decisions in AF only; it does not generalize to every indication or produce a medicine or dose.
